recommendations.title: The Hatchet Wielding Hitchhiker
recommendations.overview: After Kai saves a woman's life, he turns into an overnight hero and viral sensation — until disturbing truths about his erratic behavior come to light. This shocking documentary chronicles a happy-go-lucky nomad's ascent to viral stardom and the resu

recommendations.title: Secret Superstar
recommendations.overview: A talented teenage singer-songwriter living amid domestic abuse becomes a YouTube sensation after a video in which she hides her identity goes viral.

recommendations.title: We Have a Ghost
recommendations.overview: After Kevin finds a ghost named Ernest haunting his new home, he becomes an overnight social media sensation. But when Kevin and Ernest go rogue to investigate the mystery of the latter's past, they become targets of the CIA.

recommendations.title: Follow Me
recommendations.overview: A social media personality travels with his friends to Moscow to capture new content for his successful vlog. Always pushing the limits and catering to a growing audience, they enter a cold world of mystery, excess, and danger. When the lines between

recommendations.title: The Kill Room
recommendations.overview: A hitman, his boss, an art dealer and a money-laundering scheme that accidentally turns the assassin into an overnight avant-garde sensation, one that forces her to play the art world against the underworld.

recommendations.title: Watch Out, We're Mad
recommendations.overview: After a tied 1st place in a local stunt race, two drivers start a contest to decide who of them will own the prize, a dune buggy. But when a mobster destroys the car, they are determined to get it back.

recommendations.title: Animal
recommendations.overview: Mike (Jean-Paul Belmondo) is a stuntman who works with his girlfriend Jane (Raquel Welch). On their wedding day Mike and Jane are forced by producers to do a stunt for a film they are working on. Mike, annoyed doesn't look on the road and crashes the

recommendations.title: Double Trouble
recommendations.overview: A stuntman and a saxophonist stand in for two billionaires threatened by killers.

recommendations.title: Seriously Single
recommendations.overview: While her free-living bestie urges her to embrace singlehood, a commitment-craving social media expert can't stop following the life of a former love.

recommendations.title: The Hater
recommendations.overview: A duplicitous young man finds success in the dark world of social media smear tactics — but his virtual vitriol soon has violent real-life consequences.
